title: Login page not loading
description: Users are unable to load the login page on mobile devices.

title: Error in checkout process
description: Checkout fails when applying discount codes.

title: UI misalignment on dashboard
description: Dashboard widgets overlap on smaller screens.

title: Data export not working
description: CSV export fails for reports with more than 10,000 rows.

title: Notification emails delayed
description: Email notifications are sent with a delay of 2-3 hours.

title: Profile image upload fails
description: Users cannot upload profile images larger than 2MB.

title: Password reset email not received
description: Some customers report not receiving password reset emails.

title: Slow page load on reports
description: Reports page takes more than 10 seconds to load.

title: Broken link in footer
description: The 'Contact Us' link in the footer returns 404.

title: Search functionality not returning results
description: Search for products returns no results even when items exist.

title: Incorrect tax calculation
description: Invoices show incorrect tax for certain regions.

title: Mobile app crashes on launch
description: App crashes immediately after opening on Android 12.

title: Incorrect user role permissions
description: Certain users are unable to access admin features.

title: Attachment upload size limit too low
description: Users cannot upload files larger than 5MB.

title: API returning 500 error
description: The product API intermittently returns 500 errors.
